## Security Checklist

- [ ] No `eval()`, `exec()`, `os.system()`, or `subprocess(shell=True)`
- [ ] No data sent to external URLs outside project scope
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials
- [ ] No obfuscated or base64-encoded executable code
